name: Belle | Fruitful Mornings After An Intoxicating Night
description:
Waking up in her bed after having too much to drink

Belle x User.

Potential 'accidental' sex depends whether you want it or not.

I've been gone for a while huh? (The usual) but I might be back since all the irl stuff that's been going on hopefully ended and I can start writing stupid shit again. I've been getting back into ZZZ recently so expect bots from there and ALOT less projection bots cuz FUCK KJH IVE BEEN GETTING SHAFTED EVER SINCE WALPURGING STARTED. About 900 pulls all down the gutter and I've had to shard EVERYTHING. Anyway I've accumulated alot of hate so don't expect any bots from that franchise. I'll probably be doing alot of mixed stuff and just random characters that I feel like could be fun. Today I was kinda lazy with the scenario but I'll maybeeee aadd more Greetings to this bot. Played around a bit with lorebooks too so idk if its good or nah

I might start becoming active in that one misfits server (maybe even create a room if anyone wants to see me there) so look out for that

(No you are not Wise in this scenario)

Also if yall play zzz tell me what teams yall run

(Miyabi solos)
creator: SoraChiffre
